title: Abstention
description: A safe refusal to answer, with a machine-readable reason and a suggested next step. Abstention behavior must be tested and must never become a silent failure.

reason.description: unauthorized_scope must be phrased to the user WITHOUT revealing that restricted content exists.

message.description: User-facing explanation. Must not leak restricted content or its existence.

suggested_action.description: Safe next step, e.g. contact the document owner or refine the asset filter.
